Title: Deliver AirHealth Phase 1 firmware for consumer measurement and factory verification
Description: Ship BLE pairing, consumer measurement, disconnect recovery, low-power hysteresis, Factory mode, LED and button control, internal profile routing metadata, diagnostics, and OTA. Keep Factory mode and HW-ID out of consumer-facing flows.

Parent: Deliver AirHealth Phase 1 firmware for consumer measurement and factory verification
Title: Implement pairing and claim firmware
Description: Expose device identity and capability data over BLE, return claim proof, and persist claimed state across reboot with deterministic failure handling.

Parent: Implement pairing and claim firmware
Title: Expose device.info capability and protocol metadata
Description: Return protocol version, hardware revision, supported consumer modes, OTA support flag, and consumer-safe capability fields in `device.info`.

Parent: Implement pairing and claim firmware
Title: Implement claim.begin proof and claim-state persistence
Description: Emit claim proof tied to device identity, persist successful claimed state, and reject duplicate claim attempts with a stable reason code.

Parent: Deliver AirHealth Phase 1 firmware for consumer measurement and factory verification
Title: Implement consumer session core
Description: Enforce one active consumer session at a time and keep oral and fat session flows on a deterministic shared terminal-state model.

Parent: Implement consumer session core
Title: Update shared session orchestrator for one-session-at-a-time flow
Description: Guard concurrent starts, manage terminal transitions, preserve recovery state by `session_id`, and carry internal routing metadata through the shared orchestration path.

Parent: Implement consumer session core
Title: Add session.event and session.result schema updates
Description: Include battery state, quality gates, algorithm version, and internal routing metadata in firmware session events and completed session result payloads.

Parent: Deliver AirHealth Phase 1 firmware for consumer measurement and factory verification
Title: Implement oral measurement pipeline
Description: Support oral warm-up, sample validation, and final oral result generation without emitting completed results for invalid samples.

Parent: Implement oral measurement pipeline
Title: Implement oral warm-up and sample-validity gates
Description: Require warm-up readiness and stable valid sample gating before oral scoring can complete.

Parent: Implement oral measurement pipeline
Title: Implement oral result generation and payload emission
Description: Emit oral result payload only after valid completion and include required summary, quality, and version metadata.

Parent: Deliver AirHealth Phase 1 firmware for consumer measurement and factory verification
Title: Implement fat repeated-reading engine
Description: Support baseline lock, repeated readings, best-delta tracking, and final summary generation for fat-burning sessions.

Parent: Implement fat repeated-reading engine
Title: Implement fat baseline lock and repeated-reading loop
Description: Treat the first valid reading as baseline, collect repeated readings, and update current and best delta values according to PRD rules.

Parent: Implement fat repeated-reading engine
Title: Implement fat finish/cancel handling and final summary payload
Description: Produce a final summary on valid finish, suppress completed result emission on cancel, and preserve deterministic end-state behavior.

Parent: Deliver AirHealth Phase 1 firmware for consumer measurement and factory verification
Title: Implement disconnect recovery and session journaling
Description: Persist bounded completed session summaries and replay them by `session_id` after transient disconnect until acknowledgment.

Parent: Implement disconnect recovery and session journaling
Title: Persist bounded unreconciled terminal results with CRC protection
Description: Store unreconciled terminal result summaries with integrity protection and without raw long-duration traces.

Parent: Implement disconnect recovery and session journaling
Title: Implement session.resume.query replay and ACK tombstoning
Description: Replay completed results by `session_id` after reconnect and clear journal entries after app acknowledgment.

Parent: Deliver AirHealth Phase 1 firmware for consumer measurement and factory verification
Title: Implement low-power hysteresis and safe wake
Description: Conserve power without corrupting active or pending consumer session transitions.

Parent: Implement low-power hysteresis and safe wake
Title: Implement low-power entry and exit thresholds and debounce timers
Description: Apply low-power entry at less than 1 percent change for 3 consecutive seconds and exit on user or app action or more than 2 percent change for 2 consecutive seconds.

Parent: Implement low-power hysteresis and safe wake
Title: Gate low-power around active-session transitions
Description: Prevent low-power entry during user-initiated session transitions and ensure wake paths do not surface false measurement failures.

Parent: Deliver AirHealth Phase 1 firmware for consumer measurement and factory verification
Title: Implement Factory mode controller and provisioning latch
Description: Add manufacturing-only one-time hardware verification with 10-second long-press entry and exit, pass or fail persistence, and permanent post-provisioning lockout.

Parent: Implement Factory mode controller and provisioning latch
Title: Implement factory authorization and 10-second entry and exit handling
Description: Honor factory-only commands only after authorization succeeds and long-press entry has been completed.

Parent: Implement Factory mode controller and provisioning latch
Title: Implement one-time factory check execution and persistent lockout
Description: Run the hardware check once per unit, persist pass or fail outcome, and reject future re-entry attempts after provisioning.

Parent: Deliver AirHealth Phase 1 firmware for consumer measurement and factory verification
Title: Implement LED and button control and internal profile tagging
Description: Map runtime state to LED and button behavior and attach internal HW-ID and detected-VOC routing tags without changing consumer-facing semantics.

Parent: Implement LED and button control and internal profile tagging
Title: Implement 3-color LED and long-press button state controller
Description: Support orange, green, and red factory indications plus consumer-safe runtime LED cues and stable long-press handling.

Parent: Implement LED and button control and internal profile tagging
Title: Resolve HW-ID and detected-VOC routing metadata
Description: Resolve supported hardware profile and detected VOC routing metadata locally and attach internal tags to factory and session outputs.

Parent: Deliver AirHealth Phase 1 firmware for consumer measurement and factory verification
Title: Implement factory diagnostics and observability
Description: Capture bounded factory logs, transfer them over BLE with retry and ACK handling, and emit required manufacturing counters without displacing consumer recovery journals.

Parent: Implement factory diagnostics and observability
Title: Buffer factory diagnostic bundles separately from consumer journals
Description: Store factory diagnostic bundles in isolated bounded storage so factory noise cannot crowd out consumer session recovery data.

Parent: Implement factory diagnostics and observability
Title: Implement chunked factory log transfer, retry, and ACK flow
Description: Expose factory log bundle metadata and chunk transfer over BLE, support interrupted transfer resume, and mark bundles delivered after acknowledgment.

Parent: Deliver AirHealth Phase 1 firmware for consumer measurement and factory verification
Title: Implement OTA transport and staging
Description: Support BLE OTA manifest and chunk transfer, digest verification, staged apply, and explicit failure signaling.

Parent: Implement OTA transport and staging
Title: Implement OTA manifest and chunk receiver and progress events
Description: Receive OTA manifest and image chunks over BLE, track partial transfer state, and emit progress or malformed-chunk failure events.

Parent: Implement OTA transport and staging
Title: Implement OTA verification, staged apply, and failure reasons
Description: Verify staged image digest before apply, preserve pending slot metadata, and emit explicit validation and apply failure reasons.
